text.title: Microservices Inter-Service Communication Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for choosing a communication style per call.

step.name: list-call-attributes
step.action: Capture: caller, downstream(s), payload size, expected QPS, p99 latency budget, durability need (lose if downstream down? no? yes? must persist?), schema evolution rate, consumer count (1 or N).

step.name: apply-decision-tree
step.action: Apply: durability_required? → async. fan_out >1? → async. caller_must_wait? + latency budget OK? → sync; if internal high-volume → gRPC, else REST.

step.name: register-schema
step.action: Define .proto / OpenAPI YAML / Avro schema. Register in schema registry. Wire CI compatibility check.
step.decision-gate: If schema lives inline in code, STOP and externalize.

step.name: wire-idempotency
step.action: For writes: REST → support Idempotency-Key header; gRPC → idempotency_key field; messages → key in event header. Server-side: dedupe table or cache keyed on (key, hash(body)).

step.name: document-decision
step.action: Write ADR/spec capturing: call_name, style, rationale, fallback, retries, observability. Link from service AGENTS.md.
